scripts.clean:ports: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$ports = 3000,5000; $pids = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $ports -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; if($pids){ foreach($id in $pids){ try { Stop-Process -Id $id -Force -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host ('Stopped PID {0}' -f $id) } catch { Write-Host ('Could not stop PID {0}: {1}' -f $id, $_.Exception.Message) } } } else { Write-Host 'No existing listeners on 3000/5000' }"
scripts.dev:clean: npm run clean:ports && npm run dev
